bug.description: protocol timer configured with incorrect duration violating 3GPP timing requirements

prompt:
There is a protocol timer configured with incorrect duration violating 3GPP timing requirements downstream of function _emm_main_callback in the openair3/NAS/UE subsystem.
The function is located at openair3/NAS/UE/EMM/emm_main.c:898.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
